steps.name: vite-react-shadcn-scaffold
steps.summary: Added Vite/React/Tailwind/shadcn scaffold in experiments/03-digital-twin/web without changing MuJoCo runtime behavior. shadcn info detects Vite, Tailwind v4, radix-nova, lucide, @ alias, and button component. Verified npm run build, visual_check unitree-g1-elastic-stand, and workbench_check unitree-g1-elastic-stand PASS.

steps.name: workbench-components
steps.summary: Added React/shadcn overlay in src/App.jsx using Card, Button, Badge, Separator, and lucide icons. Existing MuJoCo runtime remains in src/main.js; legacy DOM panel is hidden but still provides currentMeta/qaWorkbenchSummary. Updated QA runners to use Vite dev server with COOP/COEP. Verified npm run build, workbench_check for unitree-g1-elastic-stand and g1-squat-reference-vs-wbc, plus visual_check unitree-g1-elastic-stand PASS.
